title: elaeocarpus ngii
intro: Elaeocarpus ngii, also known as the Borneo Blue Marble Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus ngii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of certain diseases. Elaeocarpus ngii is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
